stories.title: **Texas 9, Alabama 1 — Longhorns Dominate Game 1 at Rhoads Stadium**

x_posts.label: Post 1-1
x_posts.text:
Texas walked into Tuscaloosa and ran away with Game 1.

Kavan: 7 IP, 9 Ks, CG.
4 HR. 13 hits.
Final: Texas 9, Alabama 1.

Game 2 TONIGHT — 7:30 PM CT on SEC Network.

#HookEm #RollTide #SECSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 1-2
x_posts.text:
Leighann Goode hit 2 HRs in one game for the FIRST TIME in her career.

In Tuscaloosa. In the biggest series of 2026.

Texas 9, Alabama 1. Series lead: 1-0.

Game 2 tonight, 7:30 PM CT on SEC Network.

#HookEm #SECSoftball #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Texas Dominates Game 1 at Alabama, 9-1 — Kavan Goes the Distance in Tuscaloosa

stories.title: **Kendall Wells Hits HR No. 28 — Two Away from NCAA Freshman Record**

x_posts.label: Post 2-1
x_posts.text:
Kendall Wells: 28 HR.

Two away from tying the NCAA freshman record.

She hit No. 28 in a 275-ft shot to center as OU run-ruled Kentucky 10-2.

The history-chasing continues TONIGHT at Love's Field.

#BoomerSooner #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

x_posts.label: Post 2-2
x_posts.text:
The NCAA freshman HR record: 30 (Alo, Chamberlain, Majam).

Kendall Wells is at 28.

She has 2 home runs to make history. Tonight's Game 2 vs Kentucky starts NOW.

Watch at Love's Field — this won't wait.

#BoomerSooner #SECSoftball #NCAASoftball

article.headline: Kendall Wells Hits HR No. 28 — Oklahoma Freshman Now Two Away from NCAA Record

stories.title: **FSU Extends Win Streak to 22 — Beats Notre Dame 7-2**

x_posts.label: Post 3
x_posts.text:
Florida State's active win streak: 22 games.

Longest in all of college softball.

FSU 7, Notre Dame 2 last night. Game 2 TODAY at 6 PM ET on ACC Network Extra.

The Seminoles are not slowing down.

#Noles #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

article.headline: FSU Beats Notre Dame 7-2 to Extend Win Streak to 22 — Longest Active in Division I

stories.title: **Texas-Alabama Game 2 Tonight — Crimson Tide Must Respond**

x_posts.label: Post 4
x_posts.text:
Alabama got dominated in Game 1.

Texas had 13 hits. 4 HR. Kavan threw a complete game.

Tonight Alabama MUST respond — or drop to 7-4 in SEC play.

Game 2: 7:30 PM CT on SEC Network. Rhoads Stadium.

#RollTide #HookEm #SECSoftball

stories.title: **Texas Tech Run-Rules BYU 11-1 — Canady and Raiders Stay Hot**

x_posts.label: Post 5
x_posts.text:
Texas Tech run-ruled BYU 11-1 on Thursday.

The Raiders are 36-2. Still No. 2 nationally.

NiJaree Canady leads one of the most dangerous rotations in college softball.

Tech is WAITING for Texas to stumble.

#WreckEm #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball

stories.title: **SEC Standings Update — Texas and OU Both Move to 9-1**

x_posts.label: Post 6
x_posts.text:
SEC softball standings after Thursday:

Texas — 9-1 🤘
Oklahoma — 9-1 🙏
Alabama — 7-3

Both Longhorns and Sooners won. Both are tied for first.

The SEC title race is the most entertaining thing in sports right now.

#SECSoftball #NCAASoftball #CollegeSoftball
